questions.question: Describe the system model for deadlock in an operating system. What are the three necessary conditions for deadlock to occur?
A process P1 requests a resource R1 and a resource R2. A process P2 requests a resource R2 and a resource R1. Determine whether deadlock will occur and explain your answer.
Explain the difference between a deadlock and a livelock in the context of operating system deadlocks. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
